title: tools/closeout.sh: mechanical closeout scripted out, AI tool calls ~15→5
signal: Implemented tools/closeout.sh covering all mechanical closeout steps: version bump, session_count++, timestamps, lug archival, WAI-LugIndex.jsonl regen, score_backlog.py --update-state. Script is idempotent, has --dry-run flag, prints human-readable summary. wai-closeout.md Steps 4+5 now call the script. Reduces AI closeout tool calls ~15→5.
rationale: Every spoke performs closeout. Scripting mechanical steps saves ~10 AI tool calls per session. Source: framework spoke tools/closeout.sh (Session 116).
